mck_info.address2: My Quy Ward An Giang Province
mck_info.longBusinessSummary: Nam Viet Corporation, together with its subsidiaries, engages in seafood processing in Vietnam and internationally. The company engages in growing fish; manufacturing paper packages; printing packages of all kinds; processing and preserving aquatic products; processing fish oil and fish powder; trading fish and aquatic products; manufacturing aqua feeds; producing solar power; and constructing works. It also offers pangasius products, such as white fillet, red meat on fillet, skin on fillet, steak, butterfly, and whole fish; and value-added products, including fish balls, fennel and breaded fish balls, lean pork pie, lemongrass fish rolls, and breaded cube products. In addition, the company engages in growing fish; manufacturing paper packages; printing packages; manufacturing, processing, and preserving aquatic products; manufacturing bio-diesel oil; processing fish oil and fish powder; trading fish and aquatic products; processing and trading aqua feeds for aquatic animals; manufacturing and wholesaling veterinary medicines and aquatic products; and manufacturing and trading fertilizers. Additionally, it is involved in wholesaling metals and metal ores, and chemicals; installing electric systems; transporting goods by road; producing solar power; transmitting and distributing electricity; constructing residential and non-residential buildings; railway, road, irrigation, and mining works; hotel, villa, or apartment accommodation services; leasing non-residential buildings, such as offices, stores, shopping malls, workshops, exhibition halls, and warehouses, as well as land; and constructing processing and manufacturing plants. Further, the company exploits minerals, such as chromite and industrial halite, as well as non-ferrous metals, including iron, copper, lead, and zinc. It exports its products. The company was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Long Xuyen, Vietnam.
